summary: Phase 2 Returns Module testing completed successfully. All backend APIs (Credit Notes, Debit Notes, Replacement Orders, Loss Report) are working correctly. Frontend pages load properly with all UI elements functional including summary cards, filter dropdowns, create modals, and status update modals. Navigation links in Finance submenu are present and working.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/finance/credit-notes - Returns 200 with data
Backend: POST /api/finance/credit-notes - Creates credit note successfully
Backend: GET /api/finance/debit-notes - Returns 200 with data
Backend: POST /api/finance/debit-notes - Creates debit note successfully
Backend: GET /api/finance/replacement-orders - Returns 200 with data
Backend: POST /api/finance/replacement-orders - Creates replacement order successfully
Backend: PUT /api/finance/replacement-orders/{id}/status - Updates status successfully
Backend: GET /api/finance/returns/loss-report - Returns 200 with aggregated data
Frontend: Credit Notes page (/finance/credit-notes) loads correctly

Frontend: Credit Notes - Summary cards (Total Issued, Utilized, Balance) display correctly
Frontend: Credit Notes - Filter dropdowns (Status, From Date, To Date) work correctly

Frontend: Debit Notes - Table displays debit note data correctly
Frontend: Replacement Orders page (/finance/replacement-orders) loads correctly
Frontend: Replacement Orders - Page title and subtitle display correctly

Frontend: Finance submenu - Credit Notes link present and navigates correctly
Frontend: Finance submenu - Debit Notes link present and navigates correctly
Frontend: Finance submenu - Replacements link present and navigates correctly
Frontend: All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
critical_code_review_comments: CreditNotes.jsx: Well-structured with proper API integration, summary calculations, and filter handling
DebitNotes.jsx: Consistent design with CreditNotes, proper vendor-focused terminology
ReplacementOrders.jsx: Good status workflow implementation with valid transitions
Sidebar.jsx: Phase 2 links correctly added to Finance submenu (lines 79-81)

Backend server.py: Phase 2 APIs well-implemented with proper validation, permissions, and accounting transactions
seed_data_creation: Created test data: SR-202502-TEST01 (sales return), PR-202502-TEST01 (purchase return), SR-202502-TEST02 (sales return for replacement), CN-202602-12F61E (credit note), DN-202602-5D819C (debit note), RO-202602-8C9FEF (replacement order)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Returns module is fully functional. All backend APIs tested via curl and frontend pages tested via Playwright. Test data exists in database for Credit Notes, Debit Notes, and Replacement Orders. The Founder role may need specific permissions (finance.invoices.create, finance.liabilities.create) to create new records - Admin role has these permissions.

replacement_orders_page.table: Displays order data with priority badges and Update button
